title: eruca prolongoi
intro: Eruca prolongoi, also known as rocket, is an annual plant belonging to the Brassicaceae family, native to the Mediterranean region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant's leaves, stems, and roots are rich in vitamins, minerals, and other nutrients, providing various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Eruca prolongoi can be prepared as a herbal tea, capsule, or oil, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
